title: Hiring Software Engineer at Indifi Technologies Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at Indifi Technologies Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Indifi Technologies Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Indifi Technologies Holdings Services:
Indifi Technologies Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indifi Technologies Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
